name: hackify-marketplace
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the hackify plugin — one end-to-end dev workflow for every task.

plugins.name: hackify
plugins.description: One end-to-end dev workflow for every task — feature, bug fix, refactor, redesign, debug, or research. Replaces multi-skill ceremony with a single per-task markdown work-doc that captures spec, plan, progress, review, and post-mortem in one file.
